name: wicked-orchestration
description: Event-driven work orchestration for agents: command -> event -> projection over wicked-bus. Batch B: JSON-first projection + single-writer reducer + enforceable gate (ADR-0003).
comment:deps: ZERO runtime deps by design (Phase-1 skeleton, stdlib only). TODO Phase 2+: add better-sqlite3 (projection store) and wicked-bus (durable log + at-least-once delivery) when the reducer + outbox land.
